cause_analysis.narrative: Wynwood Salon churned on 2026-03-17 after 110 days with Zoca. Conversation collapsed into a 36-day silence starting 2025-12-17. Classification: service complaint. Negative signals appeared but no explicit cancellation request. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Escalation] First negative sentiment on 2026-01-23 via app_chat. Triggering a same-day AM touchpoint on any negative keyword would have caught this.
[Sentiment] Add an automated sentiment alerting layer over app_chat/email that pages the AM when negative keywords appear.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2025-12-17 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: I am genuinely sorry - would love to offer free month with no commitments\n\nBody: Good morning Yes, I have…" — no outbound response in 37 days.

[SLA example] On 2025-12-17 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: I am genuinely sorry - would love to offer free month with no commitments\n\nBody: Sounds good, talk to you…" — no outbound response in 37 days.
